# Eesee Metrics

> Privacy-first web analytics with AI reports, anomaly detection, and MCP server support.

Eesee Metrics is a cookieless, GDPR-compliant web analytics platform. It tracks sessions, pageviews, funnels, user journeys, retention cohorts, and JavaScript errors without storing personal data or using cookies. It generates automated AI reports (weekly/monthly/quarterly/yearly) and exposes analytics data via an MCP server (21 tools) for use in Claude, Cursor, and other AI assistants. Available as a managed cloud service or self-hosted via Docker (AGPL-3.0, open source).

## Key pages

- [Home](https://eeseemetrics.com): Product overview and signup
- [Pricing](https://eeseemetrics.com/pricing): Starter from $14/mo, Pro from $19/mo, Scale from $39/mo
- [Documentation](https://eeseemetrics.com/docs): Full setup and API guides
- [Blog](https://eeseemetrics.com/blog): Privacy analytics articles and updates
- [Compare](https://eeseemetrics.com/compare): Side-by-side comparisons with GA4, Plausible, Fathom, Matomo, Umami, PostHog
- [GitHub](https://github.com/velocidai/eeseemetrics): Open source repository (AGPL-3.0)

## Features

- Cookieless tracking — no cookies, no consent banner required in most jurisdictions
- GDPR, CCPA, and PECR compliant by design
- Real-time dashboards: sessions, pageviews, bounce rate, session duration
- Session replay, funnels, user journeys (Sankey), retention cohorts
- JavaScript error tracking and Web Vitals monitoring
- Google Search Console integration
- AI-powered weekly/monthly/quarterly/yearly analytics reports
- Anomaly detection with email, Slack, and Discord alerts
- MCP server: 21 tools for Claude, Cursor, and any MCP-compatible AI assistant
- Uptime monitoring (HTTP and TCP) with multi-region support
- Self-hostable via Docker, open source under AGPL-3.0

## Plans

- Starter: from $14/mo — core analytics, goals, uptime monitoring (5 monitors), 1 site
- Pro: from $19/mo — everything in Starter plus sessions, funnels, journeys, retention, session replay, AI reports, anomaly alerts, MCP (21 tools), Google Search Console, 5 sites
- Scale: from $39/mo — everything in Pro plus unlimited sites and team members, all AI report cadences, 50 uptime monitors, 5-year data retention, priority support
